coverage_mode: all named output fields referenced anywhere in the skill bundle, plus full source schemas and minimum explicit schemas for every logical model in model-registry
notes: Databricks SQL types are the source of truth.
Spark logical aliases are provided for agent guidance.
Use STRING-encoded JSON for supporting_metrics and upstream_model_refs to avoid nested-type instability in Prophecy.
Use explicit CASTs in the final projection of each model so compiled schemas stay stable across server consolidation or splitting.

models.grain: 1 row per session_date x traffic source x campaign
1 row per session_date x utm_source x utm_campaign x utm_content
1 row per date x product leak finding
1 row per date x product leak finding
1 row per launch window x product
1 row per period x entity x leak_type

columns.name: supporting_metrics
columns.notes: Serialize nested metric payloads as JSON text for portability.

columns.name: upstream_model_refs
columns.notes: Serialize upstream model reference lists as JSON text for portability.
